It mainly reflects in the area that giving away
                                                                                                                     some shares of loans, introducing market funds; leaving a part of the
                                                                                                                     traditional markets, opening up the field of blue sea; leaving some
                                                                                                                     part of the developed regions, developing the backward areas; leav-
                                                                                                                     ing some part of the large-scale projects, fostering SME projects; and
                                                                                                                     leaving some part of domestic business, expanding international
